keyEvents.text: First Half begins.
Goal! Bermuda 0, Curaçao 1. Leandro Bacuna (Curaçao) converts the penalty with a right footed shot to the bottom right corner.
Zeiko Lewis (Bermuda) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal! Bermuda 0, Curaçao 2. Juninho Bacuna (Curaçao) right footed shot from outside the box to the top right corner. Assisted by Leandro Bacuna.
Sontje Hansen (Curaçao) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Curaçao. Jordi Paulina replaces Gervane Kastaneer.
Goal! Bermuda 0, Curaçao 3. Jordi Paulina (Curaçao) converts the penalty with a right footed shot to the bottom right corner.
Dante Leverock (Bermuda) is shown the yellow card.

Substitution, Bermuda. Roger Lee replaces Aundè Todd.
Substitution, Bermuda. Ne-Jai Tucker replaces Reggie Lambe.
Substitution, Bermuda. Detre Bell replaces Dale Eve because of an injury.
Goal! Bermuda 0, Curaçao 5. Jordi Paulina (Curaçao) left footed shot from very close range to the top left corner.

Logan Jiménez (Bermuda) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
